creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Chris Watson from comment #0)

1. Instead of the gem from ports tree, please install all required gem via "gem install", both the same version as ports tree and the latest version, and re-run your test to see if it works correctly.

2. https://rubygems.org/gems/asciidoctor-plantuml shows that 0.1.1 is the latest version. There is no 1.2023.10.

3. Please contact maintainer of rubygem-asciidoctor-diagram.

4. rubygem-asciidoctor-plantuml00 is required by www/gitlab-ce.
